_comment: Pre-generated fixture for the /p/pitch-coach demo sample input. If the user submits the exact sample (canonical hash below matches), main.py returns this blob in <500ms. Any other input falls through to a live Gemini call or the deterministic dry-run stub.

harsh_truth.vc_reaction: I hear category words, but I still cannot picture the product.
Teams is too broad, so I still do not know who writes the check.
Ship faster sounds nice, but without a before-and-after it reads like copy, not insight.

rewrites.pitch: We help product and engineering teams turn AI app ideas into shipped products in days instead of weeks.
rewrites.when_to_use: Use this when the listener cares most about time-to-value and a concrete user benefit.

rewrites.pitch: Every software team is racing to ship AI products; we give them a faster path from prototype to production.
rewrites.when_to_use: Use this when you need to explain the category, urgency, and why now.

rewrites.pitch: Our runtime turns one API-defined workflow into a deployable AI app, so teams ship faster without rebuilding the same plumbing.
rewrites.when_to_use: Use this when the room wants a sharper wedge and a defensible product story.

2d39d674ab946f239649fb6cbde80e85bd1f9f6f.one_line_tldr: The pitch points at the category, but it hides the buyer and wedge behind generic platform language.

_debug.canonical: {"pitch":"We are a platform for AI apps that helps teams ship faster"}
